objective: task-total effective cost = input + 0.1*cache_read + 1.25*cache_creation + 5*output (incl all downstream calls)
principle: dose-ordered action family; each action grounded in an ALREADY-BUILT, ALREADY-PAID transform in src/pruning_ab/prune_methods.py so no new transform code is introduced

A0_KEEP.expected_cache_behavior: no disturbance; full prefix cache reuse

A1_LINEDEDUP.transform: remove only stripped-duplicate lines (>=12 chars) from the NEWEST eligible tool observation that already appeared in a prior observation; append '[N duplicate lines elided]'
A1_LINEDEDUP.byte_preservation: all PRIOR-prefix bytes identical; only newest segment changes
A1_LINEDEDUP.expected_cache_behavior: low cache tax (prefix preserved -> high cache_read:cache_creation)

A2_MODERATE.impl: env_log_collapse(messages) primary; dedup_content_stable + obs_cap(5k) as documented alternates
A2_MODERATE.transform: content-stable moderate compression of the newest observation: collapse verbose deterministic env/log output to a stable compact representation; cap cold recoverable tool output at 5k chars. Depends ONLY on observation content (not position/recency) to preserve cache.
A2_MODERATE.eligible_region: newest observation + cold recoverable tool output
A2_MODERATE.byte_preservation: prior prefix preserved where feasible; NOT whole-history rewrite
A2_MODERATE.expected_cache_behavior: moderate; content-stable => cache mostly preserved (prior evidence: M4/M6 cache ratio 13-14x vs recency 0.37x)

A3_AGGRESSIVE.impl: old_tool_obs_elide(messages, keep_recent_actions=8) primary; m7_plus_cap5k as amortized variant
A3_AGGRESSIVE.transform: epochal compaction: compact a LARGER cold-history region (older tool observations beyond the recent window) into a stable elision. Pay cache recreation ONCE at the compaction boundary; keep the compacted prefix byte-stable for subsequent calls (NO per-call regeneration).
A3_AGGRESSIVE.byte_preservation: one-time prefix change at compaction; byte-stable thereafter (amortization design)
A3_AGGRESSIVE.expected_cache_behavior: one-time cache_creation spike, then reduced per-call prompt; break-even depends on remaining call horizon
A3_AGGRESSIVE.quality_risk: higher (elides older context that may be re-referenced)
A3_AGGRESSIVE.amortization: one-time cache reconstruction + repeated reuse of smaller stable prefix; H_break_even = tax / per-call-saving
A3_AGGRESSIVE.eligibility: trajectory length > keep_recent_actions (enough cold history to compact)

model_for_semantic_compression: NONE — all actions are deterministic rule-based; no LLM compression, so no prompt/temperature to freeze
fallback_behavior: if eligibility not met, action falls back to A0 (byte-identical) for that call
failure_behavior: fail-closed: transform error -> A0 passthrough + logged
note: Actions are frozen BEFORE any parity/oracle outcome inspection. Any change creates a new action version + restarts the cohort.
